title: Server v2 parity for present, stabilize, verify-install, and repair-install
description:
Bring the HTTP/server surface up to parity with the newer CLI/session commands so automation does not need to shell out for recently-added recovery and presentation features.

Acceptance criteria:
- v2 server routes expose present, stabilize, verify-install, and repair-install
- request and response payloads match the CLI command contract closely enough for downstream tooling
- parity is documented in the server API reference or README
- endpoint tests cover the newly-added command mappings

context.text: 7 new convenience routes on /v2/ for present, stabilize, verify-install, repair-install, proof. All route through do_command. 7 tests. 15 server tests pass.

acceptanceCriteria: v2 server exposes present, stabilize, verify-install, and repair-install
server payloads align with the CLI/session contract
tests cover the new endpoint mappings
